title: Silent Fletcher
description: No Fletching Table sounds, accessibility for people with auditory sensory issues. Silent/Quiet Fletcher/Flething Table so you're not overwhelmed.
body:
Silent Fletcher, no Fletching Table sounds, no ovwerhelm.  
Accessibility for Auditory Processing Disorder (sensory issues).
Now Fletchers can be used, don't need to be isolated in a far away place, there can be more than one Fletcher in the same area and they can be used for more than 2 seconds.
